entry.title: hexo搭建个人博客流程
entry.content:
hexo和github搭建个人博客

1.安装node.js

https://www.cnblogs.com/liuqiyun/p/8133904.html

检查安装是否成功：

  • node -v
  • npm -v

2.安装git

https://www.cnblogs.com/xueweisuoyong/p/11914045.html

检查安装是否成功：

  • git –version

3.下载Hexo

安装命令：npm install hexo-cli -g

检查安装是否成功：

  • hexo -v

4.Github账号注册

https://www.bilibili.com/read/cv5107169/

5.github仓库搭建

先点击+号，再点击new repository。

6.生成ssh Keys

复制这个文件里面的东西

7.本地生成博客内容

新建文件夹用于存放博客

git bash here

8.发布博客到互联网上

生成界面东西全选就好，30天

9.主题配置

https://github.com/fluid-dev/hexo-theme-fluid

10.配置分类和标签

输入以下命令：hexo new page categories

输入以下命令：hexo new page tags

11.发布文章

发布文章时，在文章开头加：

  • hexo clean
  • hexo g
  • hexo s
  • hexo d

entry.title: php登陆界面
entry.content:
index.html

style.css

authenticate.php

home.php

profile.php

logout.php

entry.title: Hello World
entry.content:
Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.

Quick Start

Create a new post

More info: Writing

Run server

More info: Server

Generate static files

More info: Generating

Deploy to remote sites

More info: Deployment
